title: Building a Legacy: Thompson Scholars Create Community for the Future
summary_en: When a group of Michigan Technological University seniors saw an opportunity to strengthen the Thompson Scholars experience, they seized it — creating a new registered student organization designed to build community.  Most college seniors spend their final year preparing for  . . .
title_cn: 密歇根理工大学汤普森学者成立汤普森学者协会 构建长效服务型学生社群
